subtitle: アートブック・ZINE・ポートフォリオ 作品を魅力的に見せる編集デザインのコツ
author: 宮後優子
genre_label: デザイン実務書・判断基準抽出型ハイブリッド
required_min_chars_rule: max(original_chars * 0.025, 10000) for hybrid C/G, using G floor for safer guardrail
notes: original_chars is source.txt characters with CR/LF removed; compressed_chars includes newlines, compressed_chars_no_newlines removes CR/LF; total_output_chars_no_newlines is compressed-reading.md plus structure-map.md with CR/LF removed.
